generation.method: exact react npm tarball plus local Fast React package copied into a temporary node_modules tree
generation.probeIsolation: one Node child process per target, scenario, and mode

beforeWorker025.source: packages/react/index.js and packages/react/react.react-server.js wired Children helpers to createUnimplementedFunction before this worker slice

afterWorker025.source: generated fastReactComparisons in this oracle artifact

probeModes.reason: Default Node development Children helpers expose development element descriptors and map warnings.
Default Node production Children helpers expose production element descriptors without development warnings.
The react-server condition exposes Children helpers from a separate React root entrypoint in development.
The react-server condition exposes Children helpers from a separate React root entrypoint in production.

captures: helper function names, lengths, and descriptors
boolean children callback coercion to null
symbol and function children are ignored
map and toArray returned scalar arrays
fragment elements as leaves without rendering
portal-shaped objects as direct leaves without renderer traversal
returned element key synthesis and slash escaping
object keys use default-hint coercion for portal-shaped child traversal
callback-returned valid element object keys use default-hint coercion
same-key child and mapped element path avoids extra mapped-key coercion
symbol keys throw with development-only unsupported-key warning
pending thenable throw and status mutation
pending React.lazy child wrapper thrown thenable
rejected React.lazy child wrapper thrown reason
direct traversal only without renderer, Suspense, owner, root, portal, or ref claims

@fast-react/react.source: local workspace package copied for Children helper behavior comparison
